lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

Note: web matrix editors (Arkku, NEWP, team2xh) all output the same XML format — preview in whichever you trust, then paste the three matrix lines. For per-element control and cabin lighting beyond the global matrix, EDHM is the power option.

sources.label: Fandom Wiki
sources.what: HUD colour-matrix mechanics and the GraphicsConfigurationOverride.xml MatrixRed/Green/Blue reference.

sources.label: Frontier Forums
sources.what: Step-by-step community-canon method for editing HUD panel colours via the override file on Windows.

sources.label: Arkku HUD editor
sources.what: Live slider tool to preview the colour-transform matrix and export the values used on this page — the reference editor most presets point back to.

sources.label: NEWP
sources.what: The HUD anatomy walkthrough behind Section 1, plus the beginner-friendly colour editor with four image-previewed presets.

sources.label: team2xh editor
sources.what: Alternative slider editor with a one-click Copy-XML button — same matrix format, different live preview.

sources.label: EDHM-UI
sources.what: The 3Dmigoto shader mod (and its UI wrapper) for per-element HUD recolouring and cabin lighting — the advanced path past the global matrix.

sources.label: EDProfiler
sources.what: Manages launch-time graphics profiles (monitor vs VR) that write the same GraphicsConfigurationOverride.xml this page edits.

sources.label: YouTube — Obsidian Ant
sources.what: Graphics-tweaks tutorial covering GraphicsConfigurationOverride.xml edits, including the HUD colour matrix, alongside broader visual mods and settings.
